title: Design System: AFER Greens / Valle de Gigantes

display.purpose: Hero h1 only. Once per page. Always contains one italic <em> in Harvest Amber.

headline.purpose: Section h2 titles. Each contains one italic <em> in Harvest Amber for the thematic word.

title.purpose: h3 headings — product cards, cert cards, form sections.

label.purpose: Section eyebrow labels, stat labels, nav links, contact metadata. Always uppercase, always tracked (0.18–0.30em).

shadows.name: cta-amber-rest
shadows.purpose: Primary CTA button at rest. The only at-rest shadow in the system.

shadows.name: cta-amber-hover
shadows.purpose: Primary CTA button on hover, paired with translateY(-3px).

shadows.name: card-ambient
shadows.purpose: Light-section cards at rest. Barely perceptible; lifts card 1px visually.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Light-section cards on hover, paired with translateY(-4px).

shadows.name: product-image
shadows.purpose: Hero product image on product subpages. Heaviest shadow; used once per page.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Default easing for all transitions (hover, reveal, transform). The only ease-out in this system.

motion.name: ease-in-out
motion.purpose: Header background/backdrop-filter transitions on scroll. Not for interactive elements.

motion.name: reveal-enter
motion.purpose: Scroll-reveal enter animation. Elements start at opacity:0 translateY(40px).

motion.name: marquee
motion.purpose: Amber ticker strip. Two copies of content; seamless loop on transform.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.notes: Grid collapses: about section, product grid, contact grid go to 1 column.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.notes: Nav stacks vertically; custom cursor disabled; mobile touch targets apply.

breakpoints.name: small
breakpoints.notes: Hero h1 clamp lower bound; CTA stack direction column.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The conversion action. Amber pill with Ink text and ambient amber glow at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Outfit', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 600; background: #F7931E; color: #1D1B18; padding: 16px 38px; border-radius: 100px; box-shadow: 0 4px 28px rgba(247,147,30,0.35); transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 0.3s, background 0.3s; text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(247,147,30,0.5); background: #FBBD6E; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #F7931E; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with Agave Pale border; used alongside Primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Outfit', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 500; color: #A8C4A9; border: 1.5px solid rgba(168,196,169,0.4); padding: 15px 34px; border-radius: 100px; transition: color 0.3s, border-color 0.3s, background 0.3s; text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #FDFCFA; border-color: #FDFCFA; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #A8C4A9; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Nav CTA
components.description: Compact amber pill in the navigation bar. Entry point to the quote form.
components.css: .ds-nav-cta { font-family: 'Outfit', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; background: #F7931E; color: #1D1B18; padding: 9px 24px; border-radius: 100px; box-shadow: 0 2px 16px rgba(247,147,30,0.25); transition: background 0.3s, transform 0.2s; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #FBBD6E; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-nav-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #F7931E; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: Uppercase eyebrow label above every section heading. Amber on dark, teal on light.
components.css: .ds-section-label { display: block; font-family: 'Outfit', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.30em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #F7931E; margin-bottom: 14px; }

components.name: Product Tag Chip
components.description: Outline-only amber chip beneath product card titles. Describes format and market.
components.css: .ds-product-tag { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Outfit', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #F7931E; border: 1px solid rgba(247,147,30,0.4); padding: 5px 14px; border-radius: 100px; background: transparent; }

components.name: Form Input
components.description: Text field on dark contact section. Semi-transparent tinted glass background.
components.css: .ds-form-group { margin-bottom: 22px; } .ds-form-label { display: block; font-family: 'Outfit', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.20em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9B9585; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 1.5px solid rgba(168,196,169,0.18); border-radius: 8px; color: #FDFCFA; font-family: 'Outfit', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; padding: 14px 18px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.3s, background 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(168,196,169,0.35); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #F7931E; background: rgba(247,147,30,0.06); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(247,147,30,0.45); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: #F7931E; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(247,147,30,0.45); }

components.name: Cert Card
components.description: White card on Snow background for certification display. Hover lifts via shadow and translateY.
components.html:
Granja

Certificado #373629

Campo de cultivo

Ver certificado
components.css: .ds-cert-card { background: #FDFCFA; padding: 44px 32px 36px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #EDEAE3; box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(4,46,40,0.04); text-align: center; transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-cert-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(4,46,40,0.08); } .ds-cert-badge { width: 96px; height: 96px; margin: 0 auto 24px; border-radius: 50%; background: #78A22F; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; } .ds-cert-badge::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -6px; border: 2px solid #78A22F; border-radius: 50%; opacity: 0.25; } .ds-cert-title { font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 700; color: #042E28; margin-bottom: 10px; } .ds-cert-num { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6B6560; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-cert-num strong { color: #78A22F; font-weight: 700; } .ds-cert-scope { font-size: 0.95rem; color: #6B6560; margin-bottom: 20px; } .ds-cert-verify { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #78A22F; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; padding-bottom: 2px; transition: border-color 0.3s, color 0.3s; text-decoration: none; } .ds-cert-verify:hover { color: #042E28; border-bottom-color: #78A22F; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Navigation link with animated amber underline on hover. Scrolled header state shown.
components.html:
• Inicio
  • Productos
  • Cotizar
components.css: .ds-header { position: relative; background: rgba(4,46,40,0.92); backdrop-filter: blur(18px) saturate(160%); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(247,147,30,0.12); padding: 12px 32px; } .ds-nav-list { list-style: none; display: flex; gap: 32px; align-items: center; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Outfit', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #A8C4A9; position: relative; padding-bottom: 4px; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.3s; } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 0; height: 2px; background: #F7931E; border-radius: 1px; transition: width 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #FDFCFA; } .ds-nav-link:hover::after { width: 100%; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #F7931E; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 2px; } .ds-nav-cta { font-family: 'Outfit', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; background: #F7931E; color: #1D1B18; padding: 9px 24px; border-radius: 100px; box-shadow: 0 2px 16px rgba(247,147,30,0.25); transition: background 0.3s, transform 0.2s; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #FBBD6E; transform: translateY(-1px); }

narrative.overview:
This is the visual language of a Chihuahuan terroir estate seen through the eye of an international buyer: a premium certified supplier that communicates confidence through restraint, not decoration. The aesthetic owes more to a high-end mezcal house or a single-origin coffee exporter than to any agricultural commodity site. Surfaces are authoritative and dark; the accent is warm but controlled; nothing shouts.

The dominant ground is deep cantera teal, a near-black that reads as serious and grounded, not tech-dark. Harvest amber appears sparingly — a single heat source on the page. Agave pale carries secondary text and supporting tone, connecting the amber and the dark without softening them. Light sections switch to off-white snow to create breathing room, staying in the same family of warm-tinted neutrals.

Motion is minimal and purposeful. The interface does not perform; it invites scrutiny. An export buyer should feel they are looking at a supplier that has nothing to hide and everything to show.
keyCharacteristics: Deep cantera teal base with a single amber accent at ≤10% coverage per surface
Fraunces (serif) for all display and identity moments; Outfit (sans) for all body, label, and interface copy
Full-capsule pill buttons; gently curved cards (6px); near-flat elevation with amber glow on CTAs only
Fluid spacing and type scales via clamp() — no breakpoint-specific magic numbers
Grain overlay (fixed, mix-blend-mode: overlay) throughout all dark sections
Custom cursor on desktop (amber dot + trailing ring); disabled on mobile

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Harvest Amber covers ≤10% of any given dark surface. A page where amber is everywhere has lost its edge; a page where it appears once or twice has authority.

rules.name: The SCS Quarantine Rule
rules.body: SCS Green (#78A22F) is reserved for Primus GFS certification contexts only. Using it for decorative accents or non-certification UI dilutes the credibility signal it carries.

rules.name: The Warm Tint Rule
rules.body: Every neutral in this system is tinted toward the brand hue. Pure #000000 and #ffffff are prohibited.

rules.name: The Fraunces-Only Rule
rules.body: Fraunces is used exclusively for display, headline, and title roles. Outfit never appears in headline or display roles. The split is absolute.

rules.name: The Italic Amber Rule
rules.body: Each h1 and h2 contains exactly one <em> rendered in italic Fraunces and Harvest Amber. One per heading, the thematic anchor word. Do not use <em> for general emphasis.

rules.name: The 65ch Rule
rules.body: Body paragraphs are capped at ~520px / 65ch max-width. Wider line lengths on large viewports are prohibited.

rules.name: The Flat Surface Rule
rules.body: Surfaces between sections carry no shadows. Section depth is achieved through background contrast, not elevation. If you are reaching for a section-level shadow, use a background-color change.

rules.name: The One Glow Rule
rules.body: Amber glow belongs exclusively to primary CTA buttons. No other element uses an amber-tinted shadow. An amber glow on cards, headers, or decorative elements dilutes the CTA signal.

dos: Do use Harvest Amber (#F7931E) for CTAs, eyebrow labels, and single-word italic emphasis in Fraunces headings — and nowhere else.
Do tint every neutral toward the brand hue. Pure #000 and #fff are prohibited.
Do use <em> in Fraunces headings to render in italic amber — one per heading, the thematic anchor word.
Do apply will-change: transform and position cursor elements with transform: translate(), not top/left.
Do verify 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text against its background before shipping.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion for all scroll-reveal animations and the parallax hero.
Do reserve SCS Green (#78A22F) for Primus GFS certification contexts only.
Do use clamp() for all font sizes and horizontal padding.
Do keep product photography desaturated at rest (saturate(0.8)) and let hover restore color.
donts: Don't make this look like a generic agro-commodity site. No stock-photo tractors, no green-and-yellow palette, no clip-art certification badges.
Don't use hipster-foodie aesthetics. No kraft paper textures, no hand-lettered treatments, no warm Instagram-organic softness.
Don't import SaaS or tech-startup patterns. No hero metrics on gradient backgrounds, no card grids of icon + heading + text, no Inter anywhere.
Don't allow institutional or government tone. No heavy data tables, no bureaucratic gray.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored decorative accent on cards, list items, or specification items. Use leading icons, tinted backgrounds, or full borders instead.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. Only the contact form wrap and scrolled header are justified.
Don't animate CSS layout properties. All motion must be on transform and opacity only.
Don't use bounce, elastic, or spring easing. Only ease-out-expo and ease-in-out are permitted.
Don't remove outline from interactive elements without a WCAG 2.2 AA-compliant custom focus indicator.
Don't let footer text fall below WCAG AA contrast. Minimum 75% opacity Agave Pale on dark surfaces.
